title: thymus fallax var. densus
intro: Thymus fallax var. densus, also known as a variant of the creeping thyme or wild thyme, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Thymus fallax var. densus include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Thymus fallax var. densus can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
